title: prov-json-export protocol (W3C PROV-JSON event-chain export)
description: PROV-JSON export protocol identifier registered into adapter.protocol-or-transport per D29 + D77 §B (closes Phase C C9 per D68 §A). Activates a PROV-JSON export adapter — workspace-side EXPORT-ONLY (no inbound surface; no outbound real-wire). adapter.call('export', {output-path?}) walks workspace._substrate.event_chain.all_events() + invokes runtime.standards_export.event_chain_to_prov_json → writes JSON file at output-path OR returns dict (per D24 standards-compat tracker + W3C PROV-DM 2013-04-30 spec + W3C PROV-JSON 2014-04-30 spec). Mapping per D77 §B.1: fresh-plan event ↔ prov:Activity; event.actors[].id ↔ prov:Agent; (actor, event) ↔ prov:wasAttributedTo; workspace_id ↔ prov:Agent (workspace authority). NON-BREAKING — fresh-plan event envelope UNCHANGED; PROV-JSON is one-way export-only serialization. Per scope-cut C12: in-process tests only via tmp_path fixtures. Per D77 §D: deployment-specific PROV-O practitioner-shape mappings + per-payload-subtype prov:Entity assertion + EU AI Act Article 12 audit-record-bundle format all deferred to Phase D / regulator-guidance arrival. First example of NEW EXPORT-ONLY adapter sub-shape (no inbound; no outbound real-wire); future export adapters (OpenTelemetry / AsyncAPI / Activity Streams) register similarly per D29 namespacing.
